raw.message:
Virtual 10,000,000 FREE Coins!
(Must be 18+ to play. No real money can be won)

hook.summary: Fast-paced montage of various slot machine themes and jackpot numbers.
hook.visual_action: Rapidly spinning reels featuring fish, animals, and large jackpot counters flashing at the top of the screen.
hook.text_overlay: 10,000,000 FREE VIRTUAL COINS & 100+ GAMES TO PLAY

scene_flow: Rapid montage of different slot machine themes including ocean and wildlife symbols.
Gameplay footage of a Buddha-themed slot showing multiple '500' coin wins and lightning effects.
Gameplay footage of an Irish-themed slot with numerous 'WILD' symbols appearing on the reels.
Full-screen 'MASSIVE WIN' animation with gold coins exploding across the screen.
End card with game logo, 10 million coin offer, and 'PLAY NOW' call to action.
on_screen_text: 10,000,000 FREE VIRTUAL COINS & 100+ GAMES TO PLAY
18+. No real money or prizes can be won. Purchases / paid random items optional.
audience_proxy: Adults 35+ who enjoy the excitement and visual stimulation of social casino games.
